name: POWER SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL, INC.
summary: Power Solutions International, Inc. (PSI) is a Delaware corporation that designs and manufactures engines and power systems. The company focuses on projected sales, product margins, and market opportunities in the power solutions sector. Specific products and services are referenced in relation to warranty mitigation efforts and product market conditions, though detailed product descriptions are not included in this excerpt.
